description_long: This is a large, rectangular factory building with a utilitarian design, featuring green-painted concrete or stucco exterior walls and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main wings forming an L-shape, enclosing a spacious central yard or loading area. The facade includes several small, regularly spaced windows and a few larger industrial-style windows, as well as multiple doors and a prominent sign above the main entrance. The perimeter is partially enclosed by fencing and walls, with some areas showing signs of weathering and industrial use. There are visible rooftop elements such as vents and possibly small machinery, and a single smokestack rises from one corner of the building. The overall appearance suggests a mid-20th-century industrial or warehouse facility, typical of urban manufacturing districts.
description: A large, green, L-shaped factory building with flat roofs, industrial windows, a smokestack, and a fenced central yard. The structure features utilitarian design elements and rooftop machinery.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, sign, and a wide paved area leading to the building, with the smokestack visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced yard, secondary entrances, and a clear view of the building's L-shaped layout.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the long wing with multiple small windows and rooftop machinery, as well as the enclosed yard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yard, fencing, and the back of the main building with additional windows and doors.
